reviews.comment:

The service at this gas station is always excellent. The attendants are very friendly and helpful.

reviews.comment:
El shop deja mucho que desear. Tienen muy poca variedad de opciones para merendar o desayunar o incluso almorzar. No tienen la opción para pagar con la app de YPF

(Translated by Google)
The shop leaves much to be desired. They have very little variety of options for snacks, breakfast, or even lunch. They don't have the option to pay with the YPF app.

reviews.comment:
Muy buenos baños, agua caliente para el mate, lugar amplio para hacer parada antes de continuar el viaje, parrafo aparte, muy linda esta la ciudad de Formosa los felicito por la limpieza de la ciudad.

(Translated by Google)
Very good bathrooms, hot water for mate, a spacious place to stop before continuing the trip, on a separate note, the city of Formosa is very beautiful, I congratulate you on the cleanliness of the city.
